preview: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM dim_city

sql:
SELECT city_name, period_range_label, period_title,
  start_population, end_population, population_change_pct
FROM vw_city_period_detail_with_population
ORDER BY city_name, period_order
LIMIT 25;

SELECT city_name, country, MAX(year) AS année, MAX(population) AS population
FROM vw_city_population_analysis
GROUP BY city_id
ORDER BY population DESC
LIMIT 10;

sql:
SELECT city_name, country, year, population
FROM vw_city_population_analysis
ORDER BY year DESC, population DESC
LIMIT 25;

SELECT city_name, country, year, population
FROM vw_city_population_analysis
WHERE country = "Canada"
ORDER BY year DESC, population DESC
LIMIT 25;

SELECT city_name, country, year, population
FROM vw_city_population_analysis
ORDER BY year DESC, population DESC
WHERE country = "Canada"
LIMIT 25;

SELECT city_name, country, year, population
FROM vw_city_population_analysis
ORDER BY year DESC, population DESC
WHERE country = 'Canada'
LIMIT 25;
